notes: Batch 2: fills Parties/Restaurants/Cafés gaps and adds Live Culture + Food & Wine meetups.
missingOrUncertain: Several venues use per-show ticket pricing; pricePerClass is 0 or a lowest listed figure with uncertainty noted in longDescription.
rating and reviewCount are 0 unless stated on official pages.
Espresso Embassy image from specialty.hu (venue listing); primary brand site was unreachable during curation.
Corvin Club address (1085 Blaha) mapped to Ferencváros / Corvin-negyed as nearest canonical district.
Budapest Jazz Club (1136 Hollán Ernő) mapped to Terézváros / Oktogon as nearest canonical district.

document.name: Mazel Tov
document.shortDescription: Mediterranean garden restaurant in the Jewish Quarter — daytime brunch, evening DJs and live music.
document.longDescription:
Mazel Tov is a garden restaurant and bar in the old Jewish Quarter (Akácfa utca 47) serving Mediterranean plates, cocktails, and wines. Kitchen hours end at 22:00–22:30 depending on the day; evenings add DJs and community events. Reserve via mazeltov.hu or +36 70 626 4280.

Sources: https://mazeltov.hu/en

document.name: Ötkert
document.shortDescription: Basilica-area nightclub — two dance floors, rooftop terrace, Wed–Sat from 23:00.
document.longDescription:
Ötkert is a central nightclub near St. Stephen's Basilica at Zrínyi utca 4/A, open Wednesday through Saturday 23:00–05:00 with multiple rooms and a retractable roof terrace. Standard admission is listed at 4,000 HUF on the official site (planning figure in pricePerClass). VIP tables: reservation@otkert.hu or +36 70 330 8652.

Sources: https://otkert.hu/en/ https://otkert.hu/en/contact/

document.name: Doboz
document.shortDescription: Ruin pub with a 320-year-old tree, garden dance floor, and two indoor rooms — Wed–Sat nights.
document.longDescription:
Doboz is a ruin-bar nightclub at Klauzál utca 10 with indoor rooms and a large garden dance floor open Wednesday–Saturday 18:00–06:00. Minimum age 18. Contact info@doboz.pm or +36 20 449 4801. See doboz.co.hu for programs and VIP reservations.

Sources: https://doboz.co.hu/en/ https://doboz.co.hu/en/contact/

document.name: Instant-Fogas
document.shortDescription: Seven-club ruin complex on Akácfa utca — Europe's largest party labyrinth, daily 18:00–06:00.
document.longDescription:
Instant-Fogas merges the Instant and Fogasház ruin pubs into one complex at Akácfa utca 49-51 with seven clubs, multiple dance floors, and a garden. Most nights are free entry; some concerts ticketed on instant-fogas.com. Table reservations: +36 70 638 5040, info@instant-fogas.com.

Sources: https://instant-fogas.com/ https://instant-fogas.com/contact/

document.name: Corvin Club
document.shortDescription: Techno institution above Corvin Plaza — indoor rooms plus a rooftop terrace overlooking Pest.
document.longDescription:
Corvin Club is an electronic music venue on the 4th floor of the Corvin department store at Blaha Lujza tér 1-2, with multiple rooms and a rooftop terrace. Check corvinclub.hu for line-ups and tickets.

Sources: https://corvinclub.hu/

document.name: Great Market Hall
document.shortDescription: 1897 Zsolnay-tiled market hall — lángos, paprika, produce, and food stalls by the Danube.
document.longDescription:
The Great Market Hall (Nagy Vásárcsarnok) at Vámház körút 1-3 is Budapest's largest covered market, opened in 1897 with three floors of produce, Hungarian specialties, and prepared food. Hours and vendor info are published on piaconline.hu (market operator).

Sources: https://piaconline.hu/

document.name: Espresso Embassy
document.shortDescription: Pioneer specialty coffee bar near the Basilica — espresso, filter brews, and pastries since 2012.
document.longDescription:
Espresso Embassy at Arany János utca 15 is one of Budapest's early third-wave cafés, serving espresso drinks and hand-brewed coffees with rotating roasters. Typical drink prices are planning figures only; check in-store menus. Listed hours on specialty.hu: Mon–Fri from 07:30, Sat–Sun from 09:00. Phone +36 20 445 0063.

Sources: https://specialty.hu/en/venue/budapest/espresso-embassy

document.name: 360 Bar
document.shortDescription: Rooftop cocktails on Andrássy út — heated igloo garden in winter, skyline views year-round.
document.longDescription:
360 Bar at Andrássy út 39 is a rooftop cocktail bar above Oktogon with seasonal Igloo Garden domes in colder months. Published hours: Mon–Wed 14:00–00:00, Thu–Sat 14:00–02:00, Sun 14:00–00:00. Reservations and events: info@360bar.hu, +36 30 360 3600.

Sources: https://www.360bar.hu/

document.name: Taste Hungary Wine Circle
document.description: Curated food and wine walks, daily tastings, and cellar events run by Taste Hungary from the Palace District — introducing Hungarian wine regions and local foodways to visitors and locals.

document.name: Budapest Jazz Club Circle
document.description: Live jazz programme at Budapest Jazz Club (Hollán Ernő utca 7) — intimate concerts and jam nights in a dedicated jazz room north of the city centre.
